title: Agentic Software Engineering
description: Ship features and platforms faster with multi-agent coding workflows, verification gates, and human-owned architecture
content:
# Agentic Software Engineering

Help teams adopt agentic coding as a durable engineering practice—not a one-off demo. Design workflows where coding agents implement against clear specs while humans own product intent, architecture, security, and release criteria.

## What we deliver

- Agentic workflow design for product and platform teams
- Spec → plan → implement → verify pipelines tailored to your stack
- Tooling and guardrails (repo conventions, test gates, capability modes)
- Multi-agent orchestration patterns for research, coding, and review
- Integration of coding agents with CI, static analysis, and deploy pipelines
- Dead-code audits, import-graph hygiene, and bundle discipline under agent load
- Terminal-first and developer-experience surfaces that agents and humans share
- Training for engineers on effective prompting, review, and “evidence before done”
- Risk controls: secrets handling, scope boundaries, and production safety checklists
- Office hours / embedded pairing to stand up agentic practice on a real codebase

title: AI Platform Architecture
description: Design and implementation of scalable AI platforms—including foundations for agentic coding systems
content:
# AI Platform Architecture

Design and implementation of scalable, production-ready AI platforms that support the full machine learning lifecycle. Services include:

- AI infrastructure design and architecture planning
- MLOps pipeline implementation
- Model serving infrastructure setup
- Scalable AI model deployment strategies
- Model monitoring and observability solutions
- AI platform security and governance implementation
- Platforms for agentic coding and tool-using agents (sandboxes, MCP, policy)
- Integration with existing enterprise systems
- Feature store implementation for ML data management
- Machine learning pipeline orchestration
- Containerized AI solution deployment
- Hybrid cloud AI architecture design
- Data versioning and lineage tracking systems
- High-performance computing configurations for AI
- AI platform disaster recovery planning

title: AI System Integration
description: Seamless integration of AI capabilities into existing enterprise systems and workflows
content:

- Cross-platform AI capability deployment
- Business intelligence tool AI augmentation

title: Cloud DevOps & Data Engineering
description: Building scalable, secure CI/CD pipelines and data platforms across hybrid and multi-cloud environments
content:
# Cloud DevOps & Data Engineering

Design and implementation of enterprise-grade DevOps practices and data engineering solutions for modern cloud environments. Services include:

- CI/CD pipeline design and implementation
- Hybrid and multi-cloud infrastructure automation
- AWS, Azure, and GCP architecture and deployment
- Terraform module development for cloud resources
- CloudFoundry application deployment and management
- Infrastructure as Code (IaC) implementation
- Secure cloud resource management
- Compliance-focused cloud architecture
- DevSecOps practices implementation
- Data lake design and implementation
- Enterprise ETL/ELT pipeline development

title: Cloud Infrastructure & Networking
description: Design and implementation of secure, scalable cloud infrastructure with advanced networking for hybrid and multi-cloud environments
content:
# Cloud Infrastructure & Networking

Design and implementation of robust cloud infrastructure and networking solutions that enable secure, efficient operations across hybrid and multi-cloud environments. Services include:

- AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure architecture and implementation
- Cloud buildout strategies across multiple environments
- Orchestration and automation using Terraform, Ansible, and Kubernetes
- Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) design with proper segmentation
- Secure, scalable infrastructure for data processing platforms
- Encryption solutions for sensitive data
- AWS services implementation (EC2, S3, RDS, KMS, Kinesis, Redshift)
- Network security and firewall configuration
- Data communication across hybrid architectures
- Auto Scaling Group configuration for dynamic workloads
- Route53 DNS management and automatic updates
- Launch configurations for reproducible deployments
- IAM and comprehensive access management implementation
- Infrastructure as Code using Terraform and CloudFormation
- CI/CD pipeline design and implementation for infrastructure
- Cross-datacenter connectivity solutions
- Cloud cost optimization and resource management
- Multi-datacenter infrastructure design and deployment

title: Cloud Migration
description: Strategic cloud adoption and migration with zero downtime
content:
# Cloud Migration Services

Helping organizations successfully transition to the cloud with minimal disruption. The approach includes:

- Cloud readiness assessment
- Migration strategy development
- Infrastructure as Code implementation
- Zero-downtime migration execution
- Post-migration optimization
- Cloud cost optimization

title: Conversational AI Generation
description: Design and implementation of conversational AI systems, multi-agent assistants, and agentic tooling surfaces
content:

- Agentic coding and operator assistants (plan → act → verify loops)
- Persona design and conversation flow optimization
- Natural language processing pipeline development
- Intent recognition and entity extraction systems
- Integration with business systems, repos, and knowledge bases
- Continuous learning and improvement frameworks
- Chatbot analytics and performance monitoring
- Voice-enabled conversational interfaces
- Enterprise knowledge base integration
- Multi-channel conversational AI deployment
- Customer service automation solutions
- Regulatory compliance for conversational systems

title: Data Architecture
description: Design and implementation of scalable data solutions, from warehouses to lakes
content:

- Cloud-native data architecture across AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure

title: Data Contracts
description: Implementation of robust data contracts for reliable producer-consumer relationships and governance
content:
# Data Contracts

Establishment of clear, enforceable data contracts between producers and consumers to ensure reliable, consistent data exchange. Services include:

- Financial transaction schema design and implementation
- Avro schema design for payment, funding, and fee event types
- Multi-datacenter Schema Registry architecture and implementation
- Schema governance frameworks and approval workflows
- Schema evolution patterns and backward compatibility strategies
- PCI-compliant data contract implementation
- Enterprise data contract standardization
- Developer-friendly governance processes
- Contract testing and validation frameworks
- CI/CD pipeline integration for schema validation
- Producer and consumer application testing
- Data quality monitoring and enforcement
- Schema visualization and documentation tools
- Developer training on schema best practices

title: Enterprise Data Hub Platform

title: Kafka & Stream Processing
description: End-to-end Kafka platform implementation with advanced stream processing capabilities for real-time data pipelines
content:
# Kafka & Stream Processing

Design, implementation, and optimization of Kafka-based stream processing platforms that enable real-time data processing at scale. Services include:

- Enterprise Stream Data Platform implementation on AWS, Google Cloud, and corporate datacenters
- Multi-datacenter Kafka cluster design and implementation with 99.9% uptime
- Kafka Streams applications development for real-time analytics and event-driven architecture
- Schema Registry management across multi-datacenter clusters
- Stream data security, disaster recovery, and business continuity planning
- Kafka Connect framework configuration for database integration
- KSQL implementation for SQL-based stream processing
- Stream processing workflow design and implementation
- Change Data Capture (CDC) pipeline configuration
- Performance tuning for high-throughput Kafka clusters
- Security implementation with SSL/TLS and ACLs
- Topic naming conventions and governance establishment
- Kafka client application debugging and optimization
- Monitoring implementation with JMX metrics and Prometheus
- Infrastructure automation using Terraform, Ansible, and Kubernetes
- Zero-downtime platform upgrades and maintenance
- Cloud-native Kafka deployment across AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure

title: Kubernetes & Container Orchestration
description: Design, implementation, and management of enterprise-grade Kubernetes clusters for containerized applications and data services
content:
# Kubernetes & Container Orchestration

Navigating the complexities of container orchestration can be challenging. Building resilient, scalable Kubernetes environments that empower development teams to focus on innovation. From zero to production, services include:

- Enterprise Kubernetes cluster design and deployment
- Multi-node, high-availability Kubernetes architecture
- Kubernetes administration and operational excellence
- Container orchestration using Docker and Kubernetes
- Helm chart development for streamlined deployments
- Kubernetes networking and service mesh implementation
- Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) configuration and management
- Self-managed Kubernetes with kubeadm
- etcd cluster configuration and performance tuning
- Stateful and stateless workload management
- Pod autoscaling and resource management
- Service discovery and load balancing
- Persistent storage solutions for containerized applications
- Kubernetes security best practices implementation
- CI/CD integration with Kubernetes deployments
- Container registry setup and management
- Monitoring and logging for containerized environments

title: Observability Engineering
description: We design and implement comprehensive observability solutions for complex distributed systems
content:
# Observability Engineering

Looking beyond simple monitoring, our expertise transforms complex system data into actionable intelligence. Through our advanced observability implementations, your team gains the ability to predict issues before they affect users and drastically reduce mean time to resolution. Our comprehensive approach covers:

- End-to-end observability architecture design
- Prometheus and Grafana implementation for metrics collection and visualization
- Distributed tracing with Jaeger, Zipkin, and OpenTelemetry
- Log aggregation and analysis with ELK Stack and Loki
- Enterprise monitoring with Dynatrace, Datadog, and Splunk
- Application instrumentation with Micrometer and other metrics libraries
- Financial transaction monitoring and alerting
- Health check design for application liveness and readiness
- SLO/SLI definition and implementation
- Actionable alerting and incident response workflows
- Custom dashboards for business and technical KPIs
- Performance bottleneck identification and resolution
- Cost optimization for observability infrastructure
- Correlation of metrics, logs, and traces
- Capacity planning using historical telemetry data

title: Open Source AI Technologies
description: We implement and customize open source AI solutions like Ollama and LangChain—including agentic coding toolchains
content:
# Open Source AI Technologies

Want AI capabilities without the eye-watering costs of commercial solutions? Our team harnesses the power of open source AI frameworks to build sovereign, controlled, and cost-effective solutions tailored to your specific needs. Breaking free from vendor lock-in, we craft:

- Ollama implementation for local model deployment
- LangChain development for complex AI application workflows
- LlamaIndex integration for advanced data retrieval
- Local LLM fine-tuning and optimization
- Self-hosted vector database implementation
- Open source model evaluation and selection
- Custom AI agent development using open frameworks
- Agentic coding toolchains (CLI agents, MCP servers, workflow orchestration)
- Integration of multiple open source AI technologies into unified solutions
- Hugging Face model deployment and optimization
- Langfuse for LLM observability implementation
- Kubernetes-based AI infrastructure setup
- Private model hosting with secure API access
- Performance benchmarking for open-source LLMs
- Open source AI model integration with enterprise systems

title: Payment Processing & Financial Data
description: We architect secure, reliable payment processing systems with real-time analytics and regulatory compliance
content:
# Payment Processing & Financial Data

In the fast-paced world of digital payments, security, reliability, and insights are paramount. Our team brings decades of financial technology expertise to create payment ecosystems that not only process transactions flawlessly but transform raw payment data into strategic business intelligence. With meticulous attention to security and compliance, we build systems that grow with your business.

## Specialized Capabilities

- **Transaction Processing Infrastructure** — Secure, high-throughput payment data pipelines with end-to-end encryption and real-time validation
- **Financial Analytics & Reporting** — Custom dashboards and reporting systems delivering actionable merchant insights from transaction data
- **Event-Driven Payment Architecture** — Kafka-based systems for real-time payment event processing and reconciliation
- **Compliance & Security Framework** — PCI-DSS compliant systems with comprehensive audit trails and regulatory reporting
- **Global Payment Integration** — Multi-currency support with automated exchange rate processing and cross-border settlement

## Technical Expertise

- We design fault-tolerant payment data pipelines with comprehensive data lineage tracking
- We integrate with payment gateways, banking systems and financial service providers
- We implement real-time stream processing for fraud detection and anomaly identification
- We architect secure cloud-native financial data storage and analytics platforms
- We develop automated reconciliation systems with intelligent exception handling

title: RAG Data Pipelines
description: We build robust retrieval-augmented generation systems for AI applications
content:
# Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) Data Pipelines

Give your AI applications the power of specific, accurate knowledge without hallucinations. Our expertise in RAG systems connects large language models with your organization's private information, creating intelligent assistants that provide precise, factual responses grounded in your data. From document processing to vector search optimization, our end-to-end solutions include:

- Document ingestion and chunking pipeline setup
- Vector database selection and implementation
- Embedding model optimization for specific domains
- Query preprocessing and result ranking strategies
- Hybrid search implementation (semantic + keyword)
- Context-aware response generation
- Integration with LLMs like ChatGPT, Claude, and open-source models
- RAG evaluation and continuous improvement frameworks
- Multi-modal RAG for images and text
- Enterprise knowledge base integration
- Real-time data synchronization for RAG systems
- Document classification and routing
- Streaming architecture for RAG components
- Hallucination reduction techniques
- RAG system performance optimization

title: Site Reliability Engineering
description: Implementation and scaling of SRE practices to build highly reliable and resilient systems
content:
# Site Reliability Engineering

Downtime isn't just an inconvenience—it's a business crisis. Drawing on proven SRE methodology, this service transforms traditional operations into a data-driven reliability practice focused on customer experience. By balancing feature velocity with system stability through automation, reliability is elevated from an aspiration to a measurable engineering discipline. Comprehensive SRE services include:

- Platform operations management achieving 99.9% uptime
- Monitoring, performance tuning, and incident response systems
- SLO/SLI framework design and implementation
- Capacity planning and demand forecasting
- Production readiness reviews and launch coordination
- Incident management and resolution processes
- High-availability system architecture
- Automated remediation systems
- Infrastructure telemetry implementation
- Performance optimization for large-scale systems
- Real-time data ingestion and analysis with Kafka and Elasticsearch
- Distributed systems reliability engineering
- Disaster recovery and business continuity planning
- Security implementation with proper authentication and authorization
- Operational excellence and continuous improvement frameworks

title: Stream Processing
description: We build scalable real-time data processing pipelines with Kafka, Flink, and related technologies
content:
# Stream Processing

Your organization's data is most valuable when it's in motion. Our stream processing experts turn the firehose of raw events into a strategic advantage, building systems that react in microseconds rather than hours. By treating data as a continuous flow rather than static snapshots, we unlock capabilities that batch processing simply cannot match. Our technical arsenal includes:

- Enterprise Kafka/Confluent architecture and implementation
- Multi-datacenter and hybrid cloud streaming architectures
- Confluent Cloud design, deployment, and optimization
- Spring Kafka transactional producers and consumers
- Avro schema design and implementation
- Exactly-once processing guarantees
- Schema Registry integration and schema evolution
- Custom Kafka rebalance listeners for offset management
- Kafka Streams applications for real-time data transformations
- Kafka Connect for reliable data integration
- Spring Boot and Micronaut stream processing applications
- Containerized deployment on Kubernetes/OpenShift
- Infrastructure as code with Terraform and Ansible
- Stream monitoring and operational excellence
- Disaster recovery strategy and implementation
- Event-driven microservices architecture
- Apache Flink application development
- Spark Streaming implementation
- Real-time ML model serving pipelines
- Change data capture (CDC) implementation
- Streaming data quality frameworks
- Stream processing SLAs and monitoring
